title: Section 12
content: Authorities of 1[Institutes].--The following shall be the other authorities of 2[an Institute], namely:-- (a) a Senate; (b) such other authorities as may be declared by the Statutes to be the authorities of the Institute.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 43 of 2021, s. 15, for "Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022). 2. Subs. by s. 15, ibid., for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 25-5-2022).
